→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):9+1=10 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+1=8 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
